title: PROFESSIONAL IMMIGRANT CREDENTIAL PROGRAM - 211info
text: SE WORKS HAROLD PROFESSIONAL IMMIGRANT CREDENTIAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps immigrants and refugees find long-term jobs based on the degrees or certificates they earned in their home countries. Provides a career coach to help with credential recognition, creating an employment plan, understanding American workplace culture, and ongoing job placement support. Also offers education and skills training through on-the-job training, paid internships, and workshops. 8044 SE Harold Street Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Immigrants with degrees or certifications from a country that is not the United States of America Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 772-2330 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 772-2330 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers Immigrant/Refugee Employment Programs Job Finding Assistance * Immigrants Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - WORKSOURCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SE WORKS HAROLD
